blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
